operatingModel.specification: Repository docs, ADRs, fixtures, and evidence

current.focus: Publish the independently accepted P1-08 recorded/offline market-reference candidate as an unmerged draft pull request
current.nextGate: Push the branch, open the draft pull request, and pass required Linux and Windows CI; human-owned P1-09 remains PENDING and P1-10/P2 remain blocked

stages.name: Foundation & evidence
stages.goal: Make capture, replay, artifacts, and release evidence trustworthy before provider work.

tasks.title: Deterministic replay kernel
tasks.acceptance: Captured stream produces identical audited state and decision hashes in live-style processing and replay.

tasks.title: Artifact vault and recovery boundaries
tasks.acceptance: Raw bytes are content-addressed, verified, reconciled, and quarantined on corruption or path escape.

tasks.title: RC.2 release and platform evidence
tasks.acceptance: One exact candidate SHA is present in all evidence, passes platform gates, and is published immutably.

tasks.title: EventDraft resource boundary
tasks.acceptance: Oversized or structurally excessive drafts are rejected deterministically before canonicalization.

stages.name: Forward read-only vertical slice
stages.goal: Capture and normalize SEC, FMP, and one issuer IR source without LLMs or trades.

tasks.title: Recorded SEC end-to-end
tasks.acceptance: Recorded SEC response becomes a verified artifact, normalized EventDraft, and audited earnings cluster.

tasks.title: Recorded FMP and issuer-IR mirrors
tasks.acceptance: Arrival permutations, mirrors, corrections, inferred times, and redelivery are replay-tested.

tasks.title: Live read-only capture
tasks.acceptance: SEC, FMP, and a small issuer-IR allowlist fetch, retain raw artifacts, normalize, and capture with provenance.

tasks.title: Calendar prewarming
tasks.acceptance: Known issuer calendars prewarm the capture window without creating financial effects.

tasks.title: Observation telemetry and clock contract
tasks.acceptance: Publication, request, retrieval, normalization, and capture times plus clock basis, issuer/symbol mapping, duplicate identity, and revision identity are joinable and replay-auditable.

tasks.title: Market-reference and event-study contract
tasks.acceptance: ADR 0010 freezes observation anchors, prior-close/release-gap/residual movement metrics, quote/trade and session rules, deterministic market identity and joins, corrections, missing-data reason codes, resource bounds, licensing, and the precommitted 100-200-cluster study design without changing frozen kernel ports.

tasks.title: Recorded market-reference implementation gate
tasks.acceptance: Synthetic SIP-style quote/trade/bar fixtures cover sessions, duplicates, corrections, stale/crossed quotes, halts, missing windows, symbol remaps, malformed input, and exact/one-over bounds; normalized references are invariant to order, restart, and replay page size with no network access.

tasks.title: Zero-cost provider entitlement and retention gate
tasks.blocker: Human evidence collection may proceed now, but P1-09 cannot close until its frozen provider, dataset, feed, and fallback policy is compatible with accepted ADR 0010 and receives independent GO
tasks.acceptance: A human-owned, independently reviewed entitlement snapshot compatible with accepted ADR 0010 freezes the provider, dataset, and feed policy; separately identifies historical REST feed=sip, WebSocket v2/delayed_sip, and latest-endpoint delayed_sip; authorizes private retention, replay, research, and derived publication or explicitly approves a named lower-evidence fallback; and adds no spend.

tasks.title: Delayed historical market-reference adapter
tasks.acceptance: A bounded no-new-spend adapter stores private raw artifacts, verifies reads, normalizes market facts, deterministically selects references around the PR 2C observation anchor, and emits marketReferenceJoinKey or a stable missing reason while paid-plan activation is disabled.

tasks.title: Forward-run readiness drill
tasks.acceptance: A sustained read-only dry run survives restart, reconciliation, missed-window backfill, provider corrections, and clock regression; exports complete telemetry; recomputes identical frozen market references in memory and SQLite; respects quotas; records stable missing reasons; and creates zero dispatchable financial effects.

stages.name: Forward observation run
stages.goal: Collect and freeze 100-200 precommitted forward clusters, then validate source quality, first-observation latency, and reproducible event-time price movement before authorizing new data spend.

tasks.title: 100-200 cluster collection
tasks.acceptance: Every precommitted cluster has source timestamps, raw artifact identities, duplicates, revisions, a prospectively frozen stratum/control assignment, an event-time data-quality snapshot, and a frozen marketReferenceJoinKey or stable missing-reference reason; missing cases remain in the denominator and later trade eligibility remains out of scope.

tasks.title: Freeze observation-study dataset
tasks.acceptance: A versioned manifest binds the dataset, code SHA, configuration digest, provider entitlement snapshot, artifact/reference identities, sampling strata, exclusions, and completeness report before conclusions are calculated.

tasks.title: Event-validation study
tasks.acceptance: The reproducible report measures coverage, missingness, duplicates, revisions, publication-to-observation latency, prior-close and release-gap movement at first observation, residual +1/+5/+30-minute movement, and sensitivity to sessions, timestamp trust, quote/trade choice, staleness, outliers, provider disagreement, and missing-data treatment.

stages.name: Expectation & market snapshots
stages.goal: Freeze the context required to interpret an earnings event at the time it was knowable.

tasks.title: Prospective expectation snapshots
tasks.acceptance: FMP estimates are snapshotted prospectively with regular and aftermarket separation.

tasks.title: Market-state snapshots
tasks.acceptance: Sector/SPY abnormal movement, session, halts, and first-tradable-quote state are replayable.

stages.name: Extraction & decision packets
stages.goal: Separate deterministic facts from evidence-backed language and explicit no-trade decisions.

tasks.title: Deterministic numerical extraction
tasks.acceptance: Numbers, deltas, units, periods, and revisions are normalized without LLM dependence.

tasks.title: Evidence-backed language extraction
tasks.acceptance: LLM language and guidance extraction is source-linked, model/prompt-versioned, and replay-auditable.

tasks.title: Setup or no-trade classification
tasks.acceptance: Decision packets state setup/no-trade explicitly with deterministic inputs and evidence references.

stages.name: Historical replay & research
stages.goal: Evaluate the system with realistic latency, fills, benchmarks, and costs.

tasks.title: Parquet research datasets
tasks.acceptance: Datasets are versioned, provenance-linked, and reproducible from captured artifacts.

tasks.title: Cost-aware walk-forward validation
tasks.acceptance: Latency assumptions, executable fills, benchmark-adjusted outcomes, MFE/MAE, and costs are reported without leakage.

stages.name: Shadow & paper operation
stages.goal: Exercise hypothetical intents, broker state, fills, and reconciliation without capital.

tasks.title: Shadow intents and broker simulation
tasks.acceptance: Shadow and paper runs retain complete intent transcripts and create zero dispatchable financial effects.

tasks.title: Restart and reconciliation drills
tasks.acceptance: Duplicate delivery, stale leases, restarts, fills, and ambiguous outcomes reconcile deterministically.

stages.name: Tiny live deployment
stages.goal: Only after separate authorization, introduce a minimal live effect path.

tasks.title: Live-effect safety ADR and deployment
tasks.acceptance: Effect allowlist, broker idempotency, submission-started intent, timeout reconciliation, and no auto-resubmit are proven.
